metaData.Ingredients:
Chicken Meat, Cheese Filling [Cheese, Vegetable Shotening, Emulsifier (E452, E339, E450, E466, E412), Modified Starch, Skimmed Milk Powder, Soy Protein, Seasoning [Phosphate (E451), Emulsifier (E407a, E417), Flavour Enhancer (E621), Flavouring, Antioxidant (E316), Soy Protein, Red Fermanted Rice], Salt
• Allergen advice: Contains cheese and soy
metaData.Key Information:
• Extremely cheesy
• Be careful of hot cheese
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep frozen at - 18°C
• Do not refreeze after thawing

metaData.Key Information: Grab these succulent, classic buffalo wings glazed with a sweet and mild hot sauce that is perfect for spicing up party!
metaData.Nutritional Data:
Attributes Per Serving (90g)
Energy 203kcal
Monounsaturated 5.26g
Protein 16.7g
Total Fat 12.2g
Saturated Fat 3.7g
Polyunsaturated 3.2g
Trans Fat 0g
Cholesterol 77.4mg
Carbohydrate 6.8g
Dietary Fibre 0.5g
Sodium 511mg
metaData.Preparation:
• For Oven:
1. Preheat oven to 200°C
2. Roast Buffalo Wings for around 7 minutes
• For Oven Toast:
Toast Buffalo Wings for 15 - 16 minutes
metaData.Storage Information:
• Keep frozen under -18°C
• Do not refreeze after thawing
